root_text.sn46.45:1.2: Kittāvatā nu kho, bhante, ‘paññavā aneḷamūgo’ti vuccatī”ti?
root_text.sn46.45:1.3: “Sattannaṁ kho, bhikkhu, bojjhaṅgānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā ‘paññavā aneḷamūgo’ti vuccati.
root_text.sn46.45:1.6: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhu, sattannaṁ bojjhaṅgānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā ‘paññavā aneḷamūgo’ti vuccatī”ti.

translation_text.sn46.45:1.1: “Sir, they speak of a one ‘wise and clever’.
translation_text.sn46.45:1.2: How is a person who is wise and clever defined?”
translation_text.sn46.45:1.3: “Mendicant, they’re called wise and clever because they’ve developed and cultivated the seven awakening factors.
translation_text.sn46.45:1.5: The awakening factors of mindfulness, investigation of principles, energy, rapture, tranquility, immersion, and equanimity.
translation_text.sn46.45:1.6: They’re called wise and clever because they’ve developed and cultivated these seven awakening factors.”
